name: Italian Baked Hamburgers with Cheese
recipeIngredient: 2 Loaves pizza dough or thawed frozen bread dough
225 G ground beef (ground round or other low fat)
2 Cups spinach (wash it and cook it; chop coarsely)
recipeInstructions:
1. Refresh the tomatoes in hot water and chop them.
2. Crush and saute garlic in olive oil. Add the ground beef. Cook until browned.
3. Drain off excess oil. Add salt and pepper to taste.
4. Take each loaf of pizza dough or bread dough and cut it into 4 pieces.
Roll or stretch each piece into a 15-20 cm circle.
5. Filling the calazones: Place 1-2 Tbsp of meat on half of the dough. Add some tomato bits, spinach, 1 Tbsp cheese, and a bit of parmesan.
6. Dip your fingers into warm water. Wet the edge of the dough. Stretch half of the dough over the filling and press the edges to seal. Seal with your fingers or a fork.
7. Place calazones on a baking sheet that has been greased or covered with cornmeal. Let them rise in a warm place for 30-60 minutes. Brush lightly with oil. Bake at 180°C for 20-30 minutes.
Difficulty: moderate
Precision: measure ingredients
